The '''goa lawah''' were a native [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bird/Legends|bird]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]]. Their saliva contained [[Poison/Legends|toxic]] [[Bacteria/Legends|bacteria]]. The birds constructed nests in the [[Grass/Legends|grassy]] plains of Vortex, where they laid their [[Egg/Legends|eggs]].<ref name="PM" />

*<!-- 1998-07-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' {{1stm}}
